new_check.description: Named the actual HTTP entry point for topic creation

modifications.rationale: TopicsController#create doesn't exist in Discourse — the real entry is PostsController#create. Both agents discovered this. The old starts_with check guaranteed failure for any correct agent.

new_check.description: Named the intermediary routing layer between controller and PostCreator

modifications.rationale: Both agents found NewPostManager as the crucial layer between PostsController and PostCreator. Non-obvious from the prompt. Rewards tracing the full chain.

new_check.description: Named the intermediate Guardian method in the permission chain

modifications.rationale: Both agents found can_create_topic_on_category as the central choke point. The prompt asks 'which Guardian methods are called' — this is the key one. Not currently scored.

new_check.description: Connected Guardian permissions to frontend serialization layer

modifications.rationale: Sense's sense_search('can_create_topic Guardian permission') surfaced CurrentUserSerializer#can_create_topic (score=0.96) — the frontend serializer. Baseline didn't mention serializers in step 3. Rewards cross-layer insight.

new_check.description: Used blast radius analysis for permission change impact

modifications.rationale: Sense called sense_blast(TopicGuardian#can_create_topic?) and got full blast radius including GroupedSearchResultSerializer and DiscourseAi::Agents::Tools::EditCategory. Baseline used manual grep across spec files.

new_check.description: Demonstrates the dispatch chain connection, not just keyword presence

modifications.rationale: Both agents described this chain but current checks only require each word independently. A semantic chain check rewards connecting the two methods.

new_check.description: Used structural call graph to find wsgi_app callers

modifications.rationale: Sense used sense_graph(Flask.wsgi_app, direction=callers) to get Flask.__call__ at app.py:1618 with confidence=1.0 in one call. Baseline used grep.

new_check.description: Identified FlaskClient in testing.py as affected by wsgi_app signature change

modifications.rationale: Sense identified src/flask/testing.py → FlaskClient as an additional affected file. Baseline did not mention it. A concrete impact finding.

new_check.description: Used blast radius analysis for wsgi_app signature change impact

modifications.rationale: Step 4 is an impact assessment — exactly what sense_blast is for. Sense used sense_blast(Flask.wsgi_app, max_hops=3) and got risk=low, direct_callers=1. Baseline had to infer from grep.
